english: Adds torque and power to any vehicle by adding a hybrid battery and motor. Provides modest fuel savings for gas-powered vehicles.

Fast travel currency. Used to unlock new transporters from Stronghold to the traders.

Click [decea3]Use[-] to donate one opal towards unlocking the next trader transporter.

Read more about the unlocking transporters with the [decea3]/transporters[-] chat command. See the current transporter status with [decea3]/transporters status[-].

Welcome to [ff6a02]Hades Season 6[-]!

With the release of [ff6a02]7DtD 3.0[-] a lot has changed! This note includes the essentials to get you started, but we strongly encourage you to read [ff6a02]/guide[-] to get all the deails.

[ff6a02]Stronghold[-] has been completely rebuilt for this season. Complete the [ff6a02]Starter Challenges[-] and the [ff6a02]White River quest[-] to receive the map and quest that will lead you there along with your stone shovel.

We're also trying out the new [ff6a02]AEC International Market[-] mod. After finding Stronghold, you'll receive a tutorial quest explaining how it works. Until then, don't throw away your [ff6a02]Zombie Ears[-]—they're a valuable commodity on the Market.

Before you begin, review the new [ff6a02]Sandbox Options[-]. Death now has consequences:
- Lose [ff6a02]1–3 toolbelt items[-]
- Permanently lose [ff6a02]5% maximum durability[-] from equipped gear
A map to a place called [ff6a02]Stronghold[-] with a message scrawled on it in what looks like coal.

The apocalypse took almost everything, but humanity endures. Join us at [ff6a02]Stronghold[-]. We are a beacon of hope offering safety, shelter, and a community ready to [ff6a02]rebuild humanity[-].\n\nWe offer a [ff6a02]hotel[-] to rest, a bustling [ff6a02]market[-], and shared spaces for [ff6a02]community crafting[-], [ff6a02]gardening[-], and [ff6a02]mining[-].

Survivor, if you are reading this, you are not alone. You are invited to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-], a sanctuary dedicated to [ff6a02]rebuilding humanity[-] in the apocalypse.

We offer a [ff6a02]hotel[-], [ff6a02]market[-], [ff6a02]community crafting[-], [ff6a02]gardening[-], and [ff6a02]mining[-] facilities.

Once you arrive we can also teach you to use our [ff6a02]fast travel network[-]!
Travel to the safe haven of [ff6a02]Stronghold[-].
Accept this invitation and make your way to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-] to secure your future.
I am on my way to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-].
Welcome home! You have officially joined the [ff6a02]Stronghold[-] community.

Welcome to [ff6a02]Stronghold[-]!

As a new member of our community, your map has been synced to our [ff6a02]fast travel network[-]. Type [decea3]/sh[-] or [decea3]/stronghold[-] in chat at any time to be teleported back here.

Take these welcome supplies, grab a room at the [ff6a02]hotel[-], and explore the [ff6a02]market[-] and community areas.

Together, we will [ff6a02]rebuild humanity[-].
